name: Golden Tube Cake
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Combine cake flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large mixing bowl. Add Crisco, about 1/2 cup milk, and extracts. Beat for 2 minutes at medium speed; scrape the bowl occasionally. Add remaining milk, eggs, and egg yolk; continue beating until smooth. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9-inch tube pan. Bake for 45 minutes at 375°F until a toothpick inserted comes out clean. Cool cake in the pan on a rack for 30 minutes. Remove from the pan and cool on the rack. Frost as desired, or serve plain, or serve with fresh fruit or ice cream.
